AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.subtitle: Discover the journey, mindset, and creative drive that shape every project I take on.

aboutMe.label: About Me
aboutMe.heading: I'm Yessa, a passionate designer with over eight years of experience turning ideas into visual experiences that connect, inspire, and convert.
aboutMe.description: Every design I create is rooted in purpose. Whether it's a mobile app interface, a visual rebrand, or a complete web presence, I bring empathy, strategy, and clean aesthetics to the table.

jobs.desc: Led the redesign of the entire website and product packaging, creating a cohesive and elevated brand presence.
Designed a wellness app interface from scratch with a clean, intuitive experience for daily habit tracking.
Developed the full brand identity system, including logo, typography, and social content.
Oversaw visual direction for multiple creative campaigns, combining motion, branding, and UI work.
Supported web and visual materials for a major tech conference, contributing to its refreshed identity.
Assisted in logo design, layout exploration, and presentation decks, gaining strong foundation in design workflow.

value.label: Value
value.heading: Why with me?
value.description: More than just visuals—here's what I bring to every collaboration.

1.title: Creative Clarity
1.desc: I turn complex ideas into clean, thoughtful visuals that communicate clearly and effectively.

2.title: Reliable Communication
2.desc: A smooth, transparent process is just as important as the final design. I prioritize clear, timely communication at every stage.

3.title: User-Focused Design
3.desc: I approach every project with empathy, always considering the user's journey, mindset, and experience.

4.title: Quality Over Everything
4.desc: I focus on detail and consistency to deliver work that not only looks great but also meets a high standard of excellence.
